entity.name: Anupam Maurya
entity.description: Maintainer of @faiss-node/native — high-performance Node.js native C++ bindings for Facebook FAISS, built for RAG pipelines and vector similarity search.

projects.name: @faiss-node/native
projects.description: Async, thread-safe Node.js native bindings for Facebook FAISS. Supports FLAT_L2, FLAT_IP, IVF_FLAT, and HNSW indexes with TypeScript support and zero-copy C++ data transfer. Designed for production RAG applications and semantic search pipelines.

plans.name: Ongoing Maintenance
plans.description: Covers CI costs for native C++ builds across Linux/macOS, dependency updates, issue triage, and FAISS version compatibility.

plans.name: Feature Development
plans.description: GPU index support, Windows native builds, and expanded index types (IVF_PQ, ScaNN). Enables full-time attention to the project.
